data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this pricing structure is implemented or checked. The prior steps do not include any API reads or persisted state checks that would demonstrate the existence of a downtown premium in pricing. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence related to the specific requirement being tested.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of location-specific pricing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add pricing validation checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that pricing reflects a 10% increase for downtown locations.
